allow: Bash(dir E:standx-community-hub *)
Bash(git checkout *)
WebFetch(domain:standx.com)
WebSearch
WebFetch(domain:blog.standx.com)
WebFetch(domain:docs.standx.com)
Bash(node *)
Bash(npm run *)
PowerShell(Test-Path *)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\standx"; foreach\($p in @\('getting-started','brand-kit','templates','references','community','standers-insights','about','how-it-works'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/en/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-22} {1} bytes  status {2}" -f $p, $r.RawContentLength, $r.StatusCode } catch { "FAILED $p -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($loc = "ko"; foreach\($p in @\('','/getting-started','/community','/about','/how-it-works'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/$loc$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-20} {1} bytes  status {2}" -f "$loc$p", $r.RawContentLength, $r.StatusCode } catch { "FAILED $p -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(Get-Content *)

PowerShell(foreach\($port in @\(3000,3001\)\) { try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port/en" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0}  status {1}  size {2}" -f $port, $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "{0}  no response" -f $port } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; foreach\($port in @\(3000,3001\)\) { try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port/en" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "{0}  status {1}  {2} bytes" -f $port, $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "{0}  {1}" -f $port, $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(foreach\($loc in @\('en','es','pt-br','uk','ko'\)\) { try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/$loc" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-6} OK  {1} bytes" -f $loc, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "{0,-6} FAIL {1}" -f $loc, $_.Exception.Message } })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection *)

PowerShell($ports = 3000,3001; foreach\($p in $ports\) { try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$p/en" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $body = $r.Content; $hasNavPill = \($body -match 'nav-pill'\) ; $hasBtnPrimary = \($body -match 'btn-primary'\) ; $hasNative = \($body -match 'Українська'\) ; "PORT $p  size=$\($r.RawContentLength\)  nav-pill=$hasNavPill  btn-primary=$hasBtnPrimary  nativeNames=$hasNative" } catch { "PORT $p  $_" } })
PowerShell(Stop-Process *)
PowerShell(Remove-Item *)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "nav-pill:    $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'nav-pill'\)\).Count\)"; "btn-primary: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'btn-primary'\)\).Count\)"; "btn-secondary: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'btn-secondary'\)\).Count\)"; "panel-hover: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'panel-hover'\)\).Count\)"; "Українська:  $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'Українська'\)\).Count\)"; "한국어:       $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, '한국어'\)\).Count\)"; "OLD HUD coords \(X:\): $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'X: \\d'\)\).Count\) — should be 0")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 50 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\($ok\){'ready on 3000'} else {'timeout'})

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\($ok\){'ready on 3000'} else {'timeout'})

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "----- presence checks \(new direction\) -----"; @\('bg-bg-base','grid-mesh','accent-lime','text-display-2xl','text-display-xl','tracking-widercaps','btn-primary','nav-pill','live-dot','Українська','한국어','Português \(BR\)'\) | %{ "{0,-26} {1}" -f $_, \(\([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count\) }; "----- old chrome must be absent -----"; @\('aurora-cyan','aurora-violet','panel-glow','text-gradient','rgba\(0,212,255','sparklinePath','hex-coord','grid-fine'\) | %{ $c = \([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count; "{0,-26} {1} {2}" -f $_, $c, $\(if\($c -eq 0\){'OK'}else{'still present'}\) })

PowerShell(foreach\($url in @\('http://localhost:3000/en','http://localhost:3000/es','http://localhost:3000/pt-br','http://localhost:3000/uk','http://localhost:3000/ko','http://localhost:3000/en/getting-started','http://localhost:3000/en/community','http://localhost:3000/en/about','http://localhost:3000/en/how-it-works','http://localhost:3000/ko/brand-kit','http://localhost:3000/uk/templates'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-46} {1}  {2} bytes" -f $url, $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "{0,-46} FAIL {1}" -f $url, $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40 -and -not $ok;$i++\){ try{ $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){'dev not responding'; exit}; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "---- new command-menu nav ----"; @\('aria-haspopup="dialog"','Menu','⌘K','⌘K','K','nav-pill'\) | %{ "{0,-26} {1}" -f $_, \(\([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count\) })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en/getting-started' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "section page  $\($r.StatusCode\)  $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes"; "section nav-pills \(tab bar\): $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'nav-pill'\)\).Count\)"; "menu button present:         $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'aria-haspopup="dialog"'\)\).Count\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en/getting-started' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "menu button: $\(\($body -match 'aria-haspopup'\)\)  $\(\($body -match 'openNavigation' -or $body -match 'Menu'\)\)"; "tab nav still works: $\(\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'nav-pill'\)\).Count\) -gt 0\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "page size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "----- new navbar elements -----"; @\('aria-haspopup="listbox"','aria-haspopup="dialog"','lucide-globe','lucide-menu','>Menu'\) | %{ $m = \([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count; "{0,-30} {1}" -f $_, $m }; "----- old elements must be gone -----"; @\('appearance-none border border-border-base bg-transparent py-1.5 pl-9'\) | %{ $m = \([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count; "{0,-30} {1} {2}" -f $_, $m, $\(if\($m -eq 0\){'OK'}else{'still present'}\) })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path './0'\) { $f = Get-Item './0'; "name: $\($f.Name\)  size: $\($f.Length\) bytes  type: $\($f.GetType\(\).Name\)"; Get-Content './0' -TotalCount 5 } else { 'no file named 0' })
Bash(git add *)
Bash(git commit *)
Bash(git push *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "----- text tokens bumped -----"; "muted #909090 present: $\(\($body -match '#909090|text-text-muted'\)\)"; "----- card accents per slug -----"; @\('--card-accent','#00ff87','#5ec2ff','#f472b6'\) | %{ $m = \([regex]::Matches\($body, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\)\).Count; "{0,-22} {1}" -f $_, $m }; "----- footer attribution -----"; "x.com/thisnotmeeme link: $\(\($body -match 'href=\\"https://x\\.com/thisnotmeeme\\"'\)\)"; "@TARZANWEB3 removed from footer: $\(\(-not \($body -match 'TARZANWEB3 . Redesign'\)\)\)"; "----- footer popup placement: top -----"; "bottom-full mb-2 utility:  $\(\($body -match 'bottom-full mb-2'\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "SplashIntro mounted: $\(\($body -match 'standx-splash|SplashIntro'\)\)"; "BE STAND text in markup: $\(\($body -match 'BE STAND'\)\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "----- splash is client-only, so SSR markup should NOT include slogan -----"; "Stand together:           $\(\($body -match 'Stand together'\)\)"; "bestand-reveal:           $\(\($body -match 'bestand-reveal'\)\)"; "BE STAND \(uppercase\):     $\(\($body -match 'BE STAND'\)\)"; "SplashIntro chunk loaded: $\(\($body -match 'SplashIntro'\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "----- splash now in SSR markup -----"; "size:                          $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes"; "splash-intro class:            $\(\($body -match 'splash-intro'\)\)"; "BE STAND text in SSR:          $\(\($body -match 'BE STAND'\)\)"; "bestand-wipe SVG mask:         $\(\($body -match 'bestand-wipe'\)\)"; "lime bg-accent-lime present:   $\(\($body -match 'bg-accent-lime'\)\)"; "Stand together tagline:        $\(\($body -match 'Stand together'\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path .\\assets, .\\public -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, @{Name='SizeKB';Expression={[Math]::Round\($_.Length/1024,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "----- logo wired -----"; "brand-logo class:        $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'brand-logo'\)\).Count\)"; "logo.png reference:      $\(\($body -match '/assets/logo\\.png'\)\)"; "Community chip in body:  $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, '>Community<'\)\).Count\)"; "StandX brand text:       $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, '>StandX<'\)\).Count\)"; "live-dot left in DOM:    $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'live-dot'\)\).Count\) -- \(splash/drawer/dusd ok\)")
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/assets/logo.png' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "logo.png: status $\($r.StatusCode\)  $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path .\\assets -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'mascot|stand|profile' } | Select-Object Name, @{Name='KB';Expression={[Math]::Round\($_.Length/1024,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path .\\public\\assets -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, @{Name='KB';Expression={[Math]::Round\($_.Length/1024,1\)}} -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Copy-Item *)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(\(Resolve-Path .\\public\\assets\\mascot-standx.jpg\)\); "first 8 bytes: " + \(\($bytes | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\); $size = \(Get-Item .\\public\\assets\\mascot-standx.jpg\).Length; "size: $size bytes")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/assets/mascot-standx.jpg' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "mascot: status $\($r.StatusCode\)  $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "page references mascot: $\(\($r2.Content -match '/assets/mascot-standx\\.jpg'\)\)"; "emoji removed:           $\(\(-not \($r2.Content -match '🧍🏽'\)\)\)")
Bash(git rm *)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; "85vw,52rem clamp:           $\(\($body -match [regex]::Escape\('max-w-[min\(85vw,52rem\)]'\)\)\)"; "16rem popover clamp:        $\(\($body -match [regex]::Escape\('w-[min\(16rem,calc\(100vw-1.5rem\)\)]'\)\)\)"; "splash HUD chip uses hidden: $\(\($body -match 'hidden font-mono text-\\[11px\\] font-semibold uppercase tracking-widercaps text-black sm:inline-flex'\)\)"; "MENU text gated sm:inline:   $\(\($body -match 'hidden font-mono text-\\[11px\\] font-semibold uppercase tracking-widepill sm:inline'\)\)")

PowerShell(foreach\($p in @\('en','es','pt-br','uk','ko','en/getting-started','en/how-it-works'\)\) { try { $rr = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "{0,-22} {1}  {2} bytes" -f $p, $rr.StatusCode, $rr.RawContentLength } catch { "{0,-22} FAIL" -f $p } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "----- splash stack on narrow -----"; "flex-col sm:flex-row:    $\(\($body -match 'flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 sm:flex-row'\)\)"; "----- 44px tap targets -----"; "navbar menu min-h-11:    $\(\($body -match 'min-h-11 min-w-11 items-center justify-center gap-2 border'\)\)"; "footer link min-h-11:    $\(\($body -match 'min-h-11 items-center text-sm'\)\)"; "----- community gap-px borders -----"; "community gap-px:        $\(\($body -match 'gap-px border border-border-hairline bg-border-hairline md:grid-cols-2'\)\)"; "section directory gap-px: $\(\($body -match 'gap-px border border-border-hairline bg-border-hairline sm:grid-cols-2'\)\)")

PowerShell(foreach\($p in @\('en','es','pt-br','uk','ko','en/getting-started','en/how-it-works'\)\) { try { $rr = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-22} {1}  {2} bytes" -f $p, $rr.StatusCode, $rr.RawContentLength } catch { "{0,-22} FAIL" -f $p } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "getting-started internal Link present:  $\(\($body -match 'href="/en/getting-started"'\)\)"; "primary btn class with that href:     $\(\($body -match 'href="/en/getting-started"[\\s\\S]{0,300}btn-primary'\)\)"; "Old external Start Trading href in hero \(should NOT include cta\):  $\(\($body -match 'href="https://standx.com/"'\)\)"; "ctaPrimary localized text in HTML:"; if \($body -match '\(?:Get Started|Comenzar|Começar|Почати|시작하기\)'\) { 'match: ' + $matches[0] })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/en' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $body = $r.Content; "occurrences of standx.com href:        $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'href="https://standx\\.com/"'\)\).Count\)"; "internal getting-started href count:   $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'href="/en/getting-started"'\)\).Count\)"; "occurrences of Get Started text:       $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'Get Started'\)\).Count\)"; "Start Trading text in hero \(Spanish?\): $\(\([regex]::Matches\($body, 'Start Trading'\)\).Count\)")
